docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY BORODKIN, VLADIMIR BRIAN, WHITE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BORODKIN, VLADIMIR AS TO DEFENDANT BRIAN, WHITE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORODKIN, VLADIMIR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRIAN, WHITE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT BRIAN, WHITE ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER .COPY SENT TO DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORODKIN, VLADIMIR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORODKIN, VLADIMIR AS TO DEFENDANT BRIAN, WHITE
"ANSWER" ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT RECEIVED AND FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT BRIAN, WHITE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-31-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRIAN, WHITE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "DENIED". COPY SENT TO PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BORODKIN, VLADIMIR
